data.description: European lawmakers on Thursday called for stricter rules to protect minors online, including a bloc-wide minimum age of 16 to access social media and AI companions without parental consent. In a report adopted by the European Parliament's Internal Market and Consumer Protection

data.title: ETH's value dropped 46-60% after previous bearish signals; a similar indicator in October forecasts a potential downturn.
data.description: In the past, Ethereum has experienced a significant decrease in value ranging from 46% to 60% following bearish crosses. This October, a similar signal is emerging, indicating a potential decline in Ethereum's value.

data.title: Frontdoor's Chief People Officer, Meredith Diagostino, named one of Memphis Business Journal’s 2025 Women Who Lead. #Frontdoor #FTDR #Memphis #womenleaders
data.description: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR), a top home warranties provider in the U.S., is proud to announce Meredith Diagostino, its Chief People Officer, has been honored as one of Memphis Business Journal’s 2025 Women Who Lead. This series highlights influential leaders in the Memphis metro area. Since joining Frontdoor in 2018 post IPO, Diagostino has played a key role in creating various talent programs. It’s a well-deserved recognition for her contributions to the company's success.

data.title: DFW nonprofits awarded $271K grants for housing, education, and economic mobility; total $1.2M in 2025.
data.description: In a demonstration of cooperation and unity within the community, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) along with six of its members have granted $271,000 to eight nonprofits in the Dallas-Fort Worth (DFW), Texas area. This funding is part of a larger sum of over $1.2 million allocated through FHLB Dallas’ Partnership Grant Program (PGP) in 2025. The grants were commemorated at a ceremony and media gathering held at the FHLB Dallas headquarters in Irving, Texas. The support provided will significantly benefit various initiatives, including affordable housing.

data.title: Trump takes action to compensate certain ICE and TSA agents during shutdown, amid ongoing efforts to fund federal workers.
data.description: President Trump's recent actions represent his ongoing attempts to provide financial relief to federal workers amidst the lack of a approved spending agreement by Congress.

data.title: Ford Longmont partners with Monarch High School girls softball for fundraiser on Oct 18, 2025 from 2-5 PM at Monarch High School.
data.description: A fundraising event to benefit the Monarch High School Girls Softball Program is set to take place on October 18th from 2-5 PM at Monarch High School in Louisville, Colorado. The event is being sponsored by Mike Maroone Ford Longmont and will feature the Ford Drive 4 UR Community initiative.

data.title: InfluxData partners with AWS to bring InfluxDB 3 to Amazon Timestream, offering enhanced features for real-time applications.
data.description: In San Francisco, InfluxData released InfluxDB 3 Core and InfluxDB 3 Enterprise for Amazon Timestream. InfluxDB 3 Core, an open-source recent-data engine for real-time applications, offers high speed. InfluxDB 3 Enterprise enhances security, performance, scalability, and high availability for production environments. This is the debut of InfluxDB 3 on Amazon Web Services, providing users with new options for their database needs.

data.title: AVITA Medical appoints Cary Vance as Interim CEO, Jim Corbett steps down. Jan Stern Reed named Lead Independent Director.
data.description: In Valencia, California on October 16, 2025, AVITA Medical, Inc. disclosed that the Board of Directors appointed Cary Vance, the Chairman of the Board, as the Interim Chief Executive Officer. The company, traded on NASDAQ under RCEL and ASX under AVH, specializes in therapeutic acute wound care. Following this decision, Jim Corbett stepped down from his roles as CEO and Board member. Cary Vance will maintain his position as Chairman of the Board, with Jan Stern Reed assuming the role of Lead Independent Director.

data.title: BNB set to join Coinbase after user uproar on exchange regulations. One of its employees involved in online discussion.
data.description: Coinbase recently announced the addition of a Binance token to its list of upcoming offerings on the exchange. This move comes amidst an online conversation involving a Coinbase employee and various other prominent figures in the industry.

data.title: Revere Control Systems wins Groundbreaker Award in Birmingham Business Journal's 2025 Manufacturing Awards for innovation.
data.description: In Hoover, Alabama on October 16th, 2025, Revere Control Systems, a subsidiary of SJE, Inc., was honored with the Groundbreaker Award during the Birmingham Business Journal's 2025 Manufacturing Awards. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's innovative leadership and significant contributions within Alabama's manufacturing sector.

data.title: Salem Media Group issues SALM stock to co-founder Atsinger III instead of cash, removes stock forfeiture provision.
data.description: Salem Media Group recently announced the issuance of SALM stock to Edward G. Atsinger III, the Co-Founder, and Executive Chairman. This issuance was made in place of cash payment. The move signifies a strategic transition for the company. Atsinger has been an integral part of the organization, contributing significantly to its growth and success. The decision to issue stock to him underscores his continued importance to the company. This development also resulted in the removal of the existing stock repurchase agreement. The specific number of SALM stocks issued to Atsinger has not been disclosed publicly.
